How It Works

Simple, instant,
always ready

No app download. No complex setup. Just a scan and a reunion.

01

You Set It Up Once

After ordering, we link your contact details to your unique tag. Ready in 2 to 3 days.

🏷️
02

They Wear It Every Day

Attach to a bag, wrist, or collar — lightweight enough to forget it is there.

🐾
03

Someone Taps or Scans

Any smartphone can scan. Your contact appears instantly — no app needed.

📱
04

They Come Home

You connect with the finder in seconds. Peace of mind, handled quietly.

❤️
Our Collection

Smart tags for
every kind of family

Designed for kids who explore and wander — a quiet layer of safety on everything you care about most.

QR Scan
QR Collar Tag · For Pets

Scan. Reach. Reunite.

A sleek tag with a unique QR code. Anyone with a phone camera can scan it — no app, no tap, just point and shoot.

  • Works with any phone camera
  • No hardware or special phone needed
  • Fully customizable owner details
  • Scratch and water resistant
  • Clips to any collar easily
₹299 onwards
What shows on scan?
Choose what a finder sees when they scan the QR code.
Tap
Tap Collar Tag · For Pets

One tap. Instant contact.

A premium smart tag powered by tap technology. Just hold any phone near it — your details appear in a second.

  • Works by tapping any modern smartphone
  • Faster than scanning — zero friction
  • Fully customizable owner details
  • Durable metal finish
  • Clips to any collar easily
₹499 onwards
What shows on tap?
Choose what a finder sees when they tap this tag with their phone.
For Kids
Smart Bag Tag

Lost bags find their owners too

Clip to any school bag, tiffin, or accessory. One scan and your child's belongings come back home.

  • Easy contact if lost
  • Privacy protected — you control what shows
  • Travel-friendly and durable
  • Fits all bag types and straps
  • Waterproof for daily use
₹199 onwards

Choose what a finder sees when they tap or scan your tag.

Your identity. One tap away.

A modern card that shares your profile, links, or contact in a single tap. No paper. No friction.

  • Modern identity tool

₹399 onwards

Why Stalkr

Everything you need,
nothing you don't

Built for real life. No complexity, no barriers.

📱

No App Required

Anyone with a smartphone can scan. No downloads, no logins. Works on every device instantly.

⚡

Instant Connection

The moment your tag is scanned, your contact details appear. You connect in seconds.

🩺

Medical Info Ready

Store allergies, blood group, and vet contacts. Visible instantly to whoever finds your child or pet.

🌍

Works Anywhere in India

Whether your pet wanders in your colony or your child gets lost at a market — any phone, any city, anyone can scan and reach you instantly.

Our Story

For your kids
furry or human

Some kids walk on two legs.
Some run on four.

But both have a habit of wandering a little too far, sometimes.

We built Stalkr for those moments.

Our tags are designed to quietly protect what matters most — making it easier for someone to help, without confusion and without delay.

Because whether they are your child or your companion, they deserve to always find their way back to you.

Custom Orders

Didn't find your style?

We make custom tags for every need — different shapes, materials, and designs. Tell us what you have in mind and we'll build it for you.

Important to Know

Our Policies

💳
Payment Policy
  • Prepaid orders only
  • Processed after successful payment
  • Cash on Delivery not available
🔄
Exchange Policy
  • Exchanges for defective or damaged items only
  • Request within 48 hours of delivery
  • Must be unused and in original condition
📦
Shipping
  • Pan-India delivery via trusted couriers
  • Dispatched within 2 to 3 business days
  • Tracking link shared via WhatsApp
